# Sanitized ENTITY-MIB walk of an EXOS X465 stack (owner-captured 2026-07-16,
# normalized to -On numeric form; SERIALS REPLACED with fakes). Shape verbatim
# from the live walk: Stack(11) > Slot-N container(5) > module(9, descr =
# human model, softwareRev = EXOS version); PSUs are class 6 inside
# "Slot-N PowerSupply Slot M" containers; fans class 7 descr
# "Slot-N FanTray M"; front-panel ports class 10; VIM option modules are
# class 9 but live in "Slot-N Option Slot-M" containers (must be excluded
# from the slot-module match).
#
# entPhysicalDescr (.2)
.1.3.6.1.2.1.47.1.1.1.1.2.1 = STRING: "Stack"
.1.3.6.1.2.1.47.1.1.1.1.2.2 = STRING: "Slot-1"
